text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
A beach bathed in sunlight... What a perfect
setting for the prelude of the battle to determine
the strongest generation!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the heroes of the Golden Generation are
taking part in this very camp, and I am destined
to overthrow them!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Onward, Opera O opera troupe! We shall prevail
in this water dousing skirmish and simultaneously
bolster our own forces!
